titleStmt.title: SII 17.321: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 321. (A.R. No. 292 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.
This stops after enumerating the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi
vaḷara Irunila maṭantaiyu
m porccayappāvai
yuñ cirttaṉiccelviyu
n=taṉ perunteviyarā
ki yiṉpuṟa neṭutuya
lūḻiyuḷ ḷiṭaituṟainā
ṭu ntuṭarvaṉa velippaṭa
r vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic
cūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum
naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum
porukaṭalliḻat taraiyar tammuṭiyu
māṅkavar teviyar roṅkeḻil muṭiyum
muṉṉavar pakkaṟ teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cun=taramuṭi
yum In=tiraṉāramun=teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuva
tum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ ku
lataṉamākiya palarpukaḻmuṭiyum ceṅkatir mā
laiyuñ ceṅkatir velait tolperuṅkāval pal
paḻan=tīvuñ ceruvil ciṉavil lirupattorukā
laraicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ
cān=timattivaraṇ karutiyiruttiya cempoṟṟirut
takumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅ
kiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅ
kaṉ ṉaḷapperumpukaḻoṭu piṭiyiraṭṭa
pāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamum navanetik kulappe
rumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakkoṭṭamum
mutirpaṭa vallai maturamaṇṭalamum kā
miṭaivaḷar nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilai
virap pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭai paḻaṉa mā
cuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti yātinaka
ravaiyil can=tiraṉ ṟolkulat tintirāta(ṉa)ṉai viḷai
ṭumpiṭittup pala ta
ṉattoṭu niṟaikula
taṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭa
ruñceṟimiḷai Oṭṭavi
ṣaiyamum pūcurar cerna
ṟkocalaināṭu n=tanmapāla
ṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu
vaṇṭuṟai colaitta
ṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai
muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṇaki
rtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=tacan=tan māvi
ḻin=toṭa taṅkāta cārala vaṅkāḷa
caṅkuoṭṭal hipālaṉai veñca
mar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum pe
ṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamu
m veṟimalart tirtt teṟi puṉaṟkaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvu
ṭpalakalañ celuttic caṅkirāmavicaiyottu
ṅkapanmanākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākaiyamporu
kaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭut tuṟimaiyiṟ piṟakki
ya perunetipiṟakkamum Ārttavanakaṉakar porttoḻi
l vācalil viccātira toraṇamum moyttoḷir puṉamaṇippu
tavamum kaṉamaṇikkatavamum niṟai śrīvijayamum
tuṟainīrppaṉṉaiyum vaṉamalaiyūṟaiyiṟ ṟoṉma
laiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅ
kāvalviṉai Ilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu niṟai puṉa
l māpappāḷamum kāvalam puricaiyil mevilipaṅka
mum viḷaippantūṟuṭai va
ḷaippantūṟum kalaittakkor puka
ḻ talaittakkolamum (nti)titamāvilviṉai mātamaliṅkamum kalā
muṟi kaṭun=tiṟallilāmuṟi tecamu n=teṉakkalar poḻil
māṉakkavāramu n=toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭkaṭāramum māppo
rutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyā
r śrīrājendracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 Āvatu ḷ 10 4 ṉālContinuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 17.321 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
